rationale: This section governs posting of school district maximum compressed rates on an agency website. It referencesTax Code §11.26(a-10) calculations but does not set or depend on the §11.13(b) exemption amount. No direct conflict.
quote: the agency shall post on the agency's Internet website each school district's maximum compressed rate, as determined under Section 48.2551, for the current tax year and the preceding tax year.
_note: No direct conflict; §48.2556 is procedural (website posting). Indirect interaction via §11.26(a-10) calculations is outside this rule's operative text.
